name: set_component_reference
description: Set a serialized field (reference) on a component attached to a GameObject. This works like dragging and dropping in the Unity Inspector. Can assign GameObjects, Components (e.g. TextMeshProUGUI, Rigidbody, Image), Materials, or any UnityEngine.Object to a [SerializeField] or public field. The tool finds the source GameObject by name and automatically resolves the correct component type to match the field.

target_game_object.description: The name of the GameObject that has the component with the field to set.

target_component.description: The type name of the component that contains the field, e.g. 'ScoreManager', 'PlayerController'.

field_name.description: The name of the serialized field to set, e.g. 'pointsCounter', 'playerRigidbody'. Use the C# field name, not the Inspector display name.

source_game_object.description: The name of the GameObject to assign (or to find the component on). The tool will automatically resolve the correct component from this GameObject to match the field type.

source_component.description: Optional. The specific component type name to get from the source GameObject, e.g. 'TextMeshProUGUI', 'Rigidbody'. If omitted, the tool will auto-detect the correct component type based on the field's type. Use this when the auto-detection picks the wrong component.
